calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David Wasserman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC.
Witness, Donna Stern, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants DREVONTE POE, ERIK GARCIA, CASTON MARRUJO, TIMOTHY NASH, and BRAULIO ROMERO.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
A: 3-Day Notice to pay rent or quit
B: Residential Rental Agreement
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 100 Font Boulevard, 2-J, City and County of San Francisco, State of California 94132.

Damages $4,100.00
Holdover damages $16,400.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $425.00
for a Total Judgment of $20,925.00

Security Deposit of $1000.00 shall be handled consistent with CCP 1950.5.

Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Greg Call; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Drevonte Poe is present.
Attorney Heather Zona appearing for defendant in limited scope.
Caston Marrujo, Timothy Nash, Braulio Romero and Erik Garcia are NOT present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUN-06-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
